title: algoliasearch-helper@2.13.0 breaks build ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [algoliasearch-helper](https://www.npmjs.com/package/algoliasearch-helper) just published its new version 2.13.0.
State Failing tests :warning:
Dependency algoliasearch-helper
New version 2.13.0
Type dependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build kept failing**. **It looks like your project, in its current form, is malfunctioning** and this update didn’t really change that. I don’t want to leave you in the dark about updates though. I recommend you get your project passing and then check the impact of this update again. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 59 commits . - [`6cded09`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/6cded098ec93c226d6a39acbcbcd09ac27135ec1) 2.13.0 - 2016-08-24 - [`252414a`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/252414a9beb476d67bccd6b72101dead95bd5afc) Merge branch 'develop' - [`2d2ead3`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/2d2ead34f7de091b0fa00e575374665bf12d5c2d) Merge pull request #359 from algolia/fix/354 - [`d64860a`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/d64860ad595eea058084aeec10fc8ecd7d0b65b7) fix(getFacetValues) Fix the ordering when not specified - [`939efa0`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/939efa08687987b14b4250660ea8a89ab3a51b74) Merge pull request #356 from algolia/fix/320 - [`ded4cb2`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/ded4cb22a9bc34282a70c8c973145215270b21b9) Merge pull request #355 from algolia/feat/clearCache - [`fae498c`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/fae498c9f59b00428bdd8f9234a71687e3bb90da) fix(hierarchical-facets) do not throw if no refinements - [`7473e74`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7473e748892293c6cb7fdae0e394dbe1b0b85e08) feat(helper) expose clearCache from the client Fix #345 - [`9fcd3f7`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/9fcd3f79d2c37dab577e3e53338c105f34a89fab) doc(readme) Update build shield to develop -
